contents: From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
From HoTT Require Import Basics Types.
Definition GroupCoeq {A B : Group} (f g : A $-> B) : Group.

goals.conclusion: Group
Group
GroupHomomorphism (FreeProduct A A) A
GroupHomomorphism (FreeProduct A A) B
GroupHomomorphism (FreeProduct A A) A
GroupHomomorphism (FreeProduct A A) B

contents:
Definition groupcoeq_glue {A B : Group} {f g : A $-> B}
  : groupcoeq_in (f:=f) (g:=g) $o f $== groupcoeq_in $o g.

goals.conclusion: groupcoeq_in $o f $== groupcoeq_in $o g
groupcoeq_in $o f $== groupcoeq_in $o g
amal_eta [inr (f x)]%list = amal_eta [inr (g x)]%list
amal_eta [inr (f x * 1)]%list = amal_eta [inr (g x)]%list
amal_eta [inr (f x * 1)]%list = amal_eta [inr (g x * 1)]%list

amal_eta [inr (f x * 1)]%list =
(amal_inl $o FreeProduct_rec grp_homo_id grp_homo_id) (freeproduct_inr x)

(amal_inl $o FreeProduct_rec grp_homo_id grp_homo_id) (freeproduct_inr x) =
amal_eta [inr (f x * 1)]%list

contents:
Definition groupcoeq_rec {A B C : Group} (f g : A $-> B)
  (h : B $-> C) (p : h $o f $== h $o g)
  : GroupCoeq f g $-> C.

goals.conclusion: GroupCoeq f g $-> C
GroupCoeq f g $-> C
h $o f $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $== h $o FreeProduct_rec f g

h $o f $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inl $==
h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inl

h $o f $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inr $==
h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inr

contents: (** The goals generated are very simple, but we give explicit proofs with wild cat terms to stop Coq from unfolding terms when checking the proof. Note that the category of groups is definitionally associative. *)

goals.conclusion:
h $o f $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inl $==
h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inl

h $o f $o (FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inl) $==
h $o (FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inl)

h $o f $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inr $==
h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inr

h $o f $o (FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inr) $==
h $o (FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inr)

contents: (** TODO: unify this with [groupcoeq_rec]. It will require doing the analogous thing for [AmalgamatedFreeProduct]. *)

Definition equiv_groupcoeq_rec `{Funext} {A B C : Group} (f g : A $-> B)
  : {h : B $-> C & h $o f $== h $o g} <~> (GroupCoeq f g $-> C).

goals.conclusion: {h : B $-> C & h $o f $== h $o g} <~> (GroupCoeq f g $-> C)
{h : B $-> C & h $o f $== h $o g} <~> (GroupCoeq f g $-> C)

{h : B $-> C & h $o f $== h $o g} <~>
{h : A $-> C &
{k : B $-> C &
h $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $== k $o FreeProduct_rec f g}}

{h : B $-> C & h $o f $== h $o g} <~>
{a : B $-> C &
{b : A $-> C &
b $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $== a $o FreeProduct_rec f g}}

forall a : B $-> C,
a $o f $== a $o g <~>
{b : A $-> C &
b $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $== a $o FreeProduct_rec f g}

contents: transitivity {b : A $-> C & (b $== h $o f) * (b $== h $o g)}%type.

goals.conclusion: h $o f $== h $o g <~> {b : A $-> C & ((b $== h $o f) * (b $== h $o g))%type}
h $o f $== h $o g <~> {b : A $-> C & ((b $== h $o f) * (b $== h $o g))%type}
{ap : {a : A $-> C & a $== h $o f} & ap.1 $== h $o g} <~> h $o f $== h $o g

contents: transitivity {fp' : {f' : A $-> C & f' = h $o f} & fp'.1 $== h $o g}.

goals.conclusion:
forall a : A $-> C,
(fun b : A $-> C => ((b $== h $o f) * (b $== h $o g))%type) a <~>
(fun b : A $-> C =>
 b $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $== h $o FreeProduct_rec f g) a

(h' $== h $o f) * (h' $== h $o g) <~>
h' $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $== h $o FreeProduct_rec f g

(h' $== h $o f) * (h' $== h $o g) <~>
(h' $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inl $==
 h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inl) *
(h' $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inr $==
 h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inr)

h' $== h $o f <~>
h' $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inl $==
h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inl

h' $== h $o g <~>
h' $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inr $==
h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inr

h' $== h $o f <~>
h' $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inl $==
h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inl

h' $== h $o g <~>
h' $o FreeProduct_rec (Id A) (Id A) $o freeproduct_inr $==
h $o FreeProduct_rec f g $o freeproduct_inr
forall x : GroupCoeq f g, P x

hypotheses.type: forall x : GroupCoeq f g, IsHProp (P x)
forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall x : GroupCoeq f g, P x

hypotheses.type: forall x : GroupCoeq f g, IsHProp (P x)
forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

goals.conclusion:
forall
x : AmalgamatedFreeProduct (FreeProduct_rec (Id G) (Id G))
      (FreeProduct_rec f g),
IsHProp (P x)

hypotheses.type: forall x : GroupCoeq f g, IsHProp (P x)
forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall a : G, P (amal_inl a)

hypotheses.type: forall x : GroupCoeq f g, IsHProp (P x)
forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall b : H, P (amal_inr b)

hypotheses.type: forall x : GroupCoeq f g, IsHProp (P x)
forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

goals.conclusion: forall a : G, P (amal_inl a)

forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

goals.conclusion: P (amal_inl x)

forall x0 y : GroupCoeq f g, P x0 -> P y -> P (x0 * y)

goals.conclusion: P (amal_inl (x * 1))

forall x0 y : GroupCoeq f g, P x0 -> P y -> P (x0 * y)

goals.conclusion: P ((amal_inr $o FreeProduct_rec f g) (freeproduct_inl x))

hypotheses.type: forall x0 : GroupCoeq f g, IsHProp (P x0)
forall x0 y : GroupCoeq f g, P x0 -> P y -> P (x0 * y)

goals.conclusion: P (amal_eta [inr (f x * 1)]%list)

hypotheses.type: forall x0 : GroupCoeq f g, IsHProp (P x0)
forall x0 y : GroupCoeq f g, P x0 -> P y -> P (x0 * y)

goals.conclusion: P (amal_eta [inr (f x)]%list)

forall x0 y : GroupCoeq f g, P x0 -> P y -> P (x0 * y)

goals.conclusion: forall b : H, P (amal_inr b)

forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

       (FreeProduct_rec f g),

hypotheses.type: forall x : GroupCoeq f g, IsHProp (P x)
forall x y : GroupCoeq f g, P x -> P y -> P (x * y)

goals.conclusion:
forall x y : GroupCoeq f g,
h x = h' x -> h y = h' y -> h (x * y) = h' (x * y)

contents: intros x y p q; by napply grp_homo_op_agree.

Definition functor_groupcoeq
  {G H : Group} {f g : G $-> H} {G' H' : Group} {f' g' : G' $-> H'}
  (h : G $-> G') (k : H $-> H')
  (p : k $o f $== f' $o h) (q : k $o g $== g' $o h)
  : GroupCoeq f g $-> GroupCoeq f' g'.

goals.conclusion: GroupCoeq f g $-> GroupCoeq f' g'
GroupCoeq f g $-> GroupCoeq f' g'
groupcoeq_in $o k $o f $== groupcoeq_in $o k $o g
groupcoeq_in $o (k $o f) $== groupcoeq_in $o (k $o g)
groupcoeq_in $o (f' $o h) $== groupcoeq_in $o (g' $o h)
groupcoeq_in $o f' $== groupcoeq_in $o g'
